It’s remarkable how often you need to be dramatically upgrading your AI architecture given the pace of progress in AI models right now. 

If you’re building agents, you basically need to throw away large parts of previous work that you setup to compensate for model limitations

You cannot think your way to a perfect design. Only building and testing, over many iterations, can reveal the flaws in your mental model and provide the feedback you need to create the best design possible.
